fakty.text: Disapproval is heard from the plenary.
Vote number 96, 178 (correct: 170) deputies present, 78 for (correct: 77), 92 against.
fakty.citace: Vote number 96, 178 (correct: 170) deputies present, 78 for (correct: 77), 92 against.

fakty.text: Another proposal is the proposal of Mr. Zuna, entitled Fulfillment, I repeat, fulfillment, yes, with (the letter) "a", fulfillment of the obligations of the Czech Republic towards NATO.
fakty.citace: Another proposal is the proposal of Mr. Zuna, entitled Fulfillment, I repeat, fulfillment, yes, with (the letter) "a", fulfillment of the obligations of the Czech Republic towards NATO.

fakty.text: It sets the schedule for discussing the government proposal for the State Final Account of the Czech Republic for the year 2025 and its chapters, including the relationship of the state final budget to the budgets of state funds in 2025 as follows: First.
